text:
Market today: The mood is bullish for tech and chips, driven by strong AI demand and surging equities trading. This directly fuels your concentrated portfolio.

Your holdings: SOXL (-30.59%) and SPAL (-36.78%) are in deep drawdown and well below their stops; both are leveraged and decay. SMH (-5.67%) is also negative. Margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions and any further news on AI chip demand, as it's a key driver for your book.

Bottom line: Your leveraged ETFs need immediate attention, while the broader chip sector shows strong tailwinds.
plays: SOXL: This leveraged ETF is deep in the red (-30.59%) and below its default stop. Re-evaluate your risk on this decaying asset.
SPAL: Also a leveraged ETF, it's down significantly (-36.78%) and below its stop. Consider trimming or exiting to manage margin risk.
AMD: The scanner shows a BUY (9/12) at entry 547.58-547.03, stop 545.95. Strong AI chip demand news (ASML) supports this chip name.
